titles.text: Ganbare Goemon: Toukai Douchuu Ooedo Tengurigaeshi no Maki
がんばれゴエモン 東海道中 大江戸天狗り返しの巻

descriptions.text: A Ganbare Goemon game released for the Nintendo DS on June 23, 2005 in Japan. Its release marked the revival of the series' medieval Japanese themes and quirky humor, as previous games had taken place in a futuristic setting or with a more serious tone.
